site.name: Seklok
auth.register.title: Create Account
auth.register.err_password: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.register.err_duplicate: An account with this email already exists
auth.register.welcome_flash: Welcome! Your default project master key is shown below.
auth.login.title: Sign In
auth.verify.title: Email Verification
auth.verify.send_failed: Failed to send verification email. Try again later.
auth.verify.sent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
projects.title: Projects ({count})
projects.master_key_generated: New master key generated for project {name}.
projects.master_key_backup: Back it up and keep it secret. Alternatively you can use your own master key/passphrase.
projects.new.title: New Project
projects.detail.title: {name} Project
projects.detail.sealed_msg: Project master key is not currently set. Fill it below to keep it stored temporarily in memory.
projects.rotate.title: Rotate Master Key for project {name}
projects.rotate.warning_text: This will re-encrypt all secrets with the new master key.
projects.rotate.warning_tokens: Service tokens will be invalidated and need to be re-created.
projects.rotate.current_key_hint: Enter the project's current master key to authorise rotation.
projects.rotate.new_key_hint: Leave blank to have Seklok generate a fresh 32-byte key. Only enter your own value if you want to use a custom passphrase.
projects.rotate_post.title: Rotation Complete for {name}
projects.rotate_post.flash: Master key rotated successfully. All secrets re-encrypted.
projects.rotate_post.warning: These tokens encode the old master key. They must be regenerated.
flash.verify_email: Please verify your email before creating projects
flash.project_created_key: Project created. New master key generated.
flash.key_set: Master key has been set successfully
secrets.title: Secrets for {project} / {environment}
secrets.missing_text: (exist in other environments but not here):
tokens.title: Service Tokens for {name}
tokens.new_generated: New service token generated. Back it up and keep it secret.
tokens.no_tokens: No service tokens for this project.
tokens.new.title: New Service Token for {name}
secret_reveal.master_key_description: This is the master key that decrypts all secrets you store in this project. You will need it whenever the server restarts (to unseal the project) and when issuing service tokens.
secret_reveal.master_key_warning: This key is shown ONCE. We never store the plaintext value. If you lose it, the project's secrets cannot be recovered.
secret_reveal.service_token_description: Use this token in the Authorization header (Bearer ...) of API requests. It encodes the project's master key, so anyone with this token can read/write the secrets it grants access to.
secret_reveal.service_token_warning: This token is shown ONCE. Store it in your secret manager / CI variables before continuing.
secret_reveal.confirm_label: I have saved this value securely. I understand it will not be shown again.
secret_reveal.rotated_description: Rotation succeeded. All secrets in this project have been re-encrypted with this new master key. Existing service tokens still embed the OLD key and must be re-created.
secret_reveal.leave_warning: You haven't confirmed that you saved the secret. If you leave this page, the value will be lost forever.
